entities.name: Social Media
entities.context: Communication channel with tone range 1-2, professional yet approachable

entities.name: Formality Levels
entities.context: Three-tier scale (Casual, Balanced, Formal) for calibrating communication tone

entities.name: Warmth Score
entities.context: Metric that modifies formality level inversely - high warmth reduces formality, low warmth increases it

entities.name: Shift Rules
entities.context: Contextual rules for when to adjust formality up or down based on audience and situation

relationships.context: Warmth Score acts as a modifier that shifts Formality Levels up or down
Social Media channel applies the Formality Levels framework with Balanced as default
